message:
feat(mux): implement zoom split as optimistic frontend update

Toggle zoom mode to make active panel fill entire tab by hiding other
splits and dividers. Uses CSS toggle and DOM manipulation for instant
feedback without server roundtrip.

files.patch:
@@ -274,6 +274,8 @@
       case '_previous_split':
       case '_next_split':
       case '_zoom_split':
+        muxClient?.zoomSplit();
+        break;
       case '_equalize_splits':
       case '_select_split_up':
       case '_select_split_down':
